title: pilosella glomerata subsp. bialkana
intro: Pilosella glomerata subsp. bialkana is a plant species in the dandelion family, Asteraceae, native to the Balkan Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Pilosella glomerata subsp. bialkana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
